[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1010010 3
1 0100100 2
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 0011000 2

01 10 0011000 2 match 7
